apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: akhq
  namespace: kafka
  annotations:
    reloader.stakater.com/auto: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: akhq
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: akhq
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
      containers:
        - name: akhq
          image: registry.fraud.internal/fraud-platform/akhq:0.26.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: AKHQ_CONFIGURATION
              value: |
                akhq:
                  connections:
                    fraud-cluster:
                      properties:
                        bootstrap.servers: "kafka.kafka.svc.cluster.local:9092"
                        security.protocol: "SASL_SSL"
                        sasl.mechanism: "SCRAM-SHA-512"
                        sasl.jaas.config: "org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramLoginModule required username=\"akhq\" password=\"${AKHQ_KAFKA_PASSWORD}\";"
                        ssl.truststore.location: "/etc/ssl/trust/truststore.p12"
                        ssl.truststore.type: "PKCS12"
                        ssl.truststore.password: "${TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD}"
                      schema-registry:
                        url: "http://apicurio.apicurio.svc.cluster.local:8080/apis/ccompat/v7"
                      connect:
                        - name: debezium
                          url: "http://debezium-headless.debezium.svc.cluster.local:8083"

                  security:
                    default-group: reader
                    oidc:
                      enabled: true
                      providers:
                        keycloak:
                          label: "Login with Keycloak"
                          username-field: preferred_username
                          groups-field: roles
                          default-group: reader
                          groups:
                            - name: admin
                              groups:
                                - admin
                            - name: reader
                              groups:
                                - viewer
                                - operator

                  micronaut:
                    security:
                      oauth2:
                        enabled: true
                        clients:
                          keycloak:
                            client-id: akhq
                            client-secret: ${AKHQ_OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET}
                            openid:
                              issuer: https://auth.fraud.internal/realms/fraud-platform
            # SASL/SCRAM credentials for Kafka connection
            - name: AKHQ_KAFKA_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: kafka-sasl-credentials
                  key: akhq-password
            - name: TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: truststore-password
                  key: password
            # OIDC client secret from ExternalSecret
            - name: AKHQ_OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: akhq-oidc-credentials
                  key: client-secret
                  optional: true
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "256Mi"
              cpu: "100m"
            limits:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "500m"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10

metadata:
  name: akhq
  namespace: kafka
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080

# Deploy only when server-side encryption is required.
# See section 7a.14 of the production hardening plan for prerequisites.
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: kes
  namespace: minio
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: kes
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: kes
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: kes
          image: registry.fraud.internal/fraud-platform/kes:2025-03-12T09-35-18Z
          command: ["kes", "server", "--config=/etc/kes/config.yaml"]
          ports:
            - containerPort: 7373
          volumeMounts:
            - name: kes-config
              mountPath: /etc/kes
            - name: kes-tls
              mountPath: /certs
      volumes:
        - name: kes-config
          configMap:
            name: kes-config
        - name: kes-tls
          secret:
            secretName: kes-tls
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: kes-config
  namespace: minio
data:
  config.yaml: |
    address: 0.0.0.0:7373
    tls:
      cert: /certs/tls.crt
      key:  /certs/tls.key
    keystore:
      vault:
        endpoint: https://vault.vault.svc.cluster.local:8200
        engine:   kv          # KV secrets engine
        version:  v2
        approle:
          id:     <vault-role-id>
          secret: <vault-secret-id>
          retry:  15s
        tls:
          ca: /certs/ca.crt

apiVersion: apps/v1

  namespace: minio
spec:

      app: kes

    metadata:
      labels:
        app: kes

      containers:
        - name: kes
          image: ${IMAGE_REGISTRY}/kes:${MINIO_KES_VERSION}
          command: ["kes", "server", "--config=/etc/kes/config.yaml"]

              mountPath: /etc/kes

      volumes:
        - name: kes-config
          configMap:
            name: kes-config

          secret:
            secretName: kes-tls

apiVersion: v1

  name: kes-config
  namespace: minio

  config.yaml: |
    address: 0.0.0.0:7373
    tls:
      cert: /certs/tls.crt
      key:  /certs/tls.key
    keystore:
      vault:
        endpoint: ${OPENBAO_ADDR}
        engine:   kv          # KV secrets engine

code_before:
# Create MinIO buckets for Loki storage
# Run BEFORE deploying Loki — it needs the buckets to exist at startup
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: loki-minio-bucket-setup
  namespace: logging
  labels:
    app: loki
    component: storage-setup
spec:
  ttlSecondsAfterFinished: 300
  template:
    spec:
      restartPolicy: OnFailure
      containers:
        - name: mc
          image: registry.fraud.internal/fraud-platform/mc:RELEASE.2025-08-13T08-35-41Z
          command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - |
              set -e
              echo "Configuring MinIO client..."
              mc alias set minio https://minio.minio.svc.cluster.local:9000 $MINIO_ACCESS_KEY $MINIO_SECRET_KEY --insecure

              echo "Creating Loki chunks bucket..."
              if mc ls minio/loki-chunks 2>/dev/null; then
                echo "Bucket loki-chunks already exists"
              else
                mc mb minio/loki-chunks --insecure
                echo "Bucket loki-chunks created"
              fi

              echo "Creating Loki ruler bucket..."
              if mc ls minio/loki-ruler 2>/dev/null; then
                echo "Bucket loki-ruler already exists"
              else
                mc mb minio/loki-ruler --insecure
                echo "Bucket loki-ruler created"
              fi

              echo "Setting bucket policies..."
              mc anonymous set none minio/loki-chunks --insecure
              mc anonymous set none minio/loki-ruler --insecure

              echo "Verifying buckets..."
              mc ls minio/ --insecure | grep loki

              echo "Loki MinIO bucket setup complete."
          env:
            - name: MINIO_ACCESS_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: minio-credentials
                  key: MINIO_ROOT_USER
            - name: MINIO_SECRET_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: minio-credentials
                  key: MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD
code_after:
# Create MinIO buckets for Loki storage
# Run BEFORE deploying Loki — it needs the buckets to exist at startup
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: loki-minio-bucket-setup
  namespace: logging
  labels:
    app: loki
    component: storage-setup
spec:
  ttlSecondsAfterFinished: 300
  template:
    spec:
      restartPolicy: OnFailure
      containers:
        - name: mc
          image: registry.fraud.internal/fraud-platform/mc:RELEASE.2025-08-13T08-35-41Z
          command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - |
              set -e
              echo "Configuring MinIO client..."
              mc alias set minio https://minio.minio.svc.cluster.local:9000 $MINIO_ACCESS_KEY $MINIO_SECRET_KEY --api S3v4

              echo "Creating Loki chunks bucket..."
              if mc ls minio/loki-chunks 2>/dev/null; then
                echo "Bucket loki-chunks already exists"
              else
                mc mb minio/loki-chunks
                echo "Bucket loki-chunks created"
              fi

              echo "Creating Loki ruler bucket..."
              if mc ls minio/loki-ruler 2>/dev/null; then
                echo "Bucket loki-ruler already exists"
              else
                mc mb minio/loki-ruler
                echo "Bucket loki-ruler created"
              fi

              echo "Setting bucket policies..."
              mc anonymous set none minio/loki-chunks
              mc anonymous set none minio/loki-ruler

              echo "Verifying buckets..."
              mc ls minio/ | grep loki

              echo "Loki MinIO bucket setup complete."
          env:
            - name: SSL_CERT_FILE
              value: "/etc/ssl/trust/ca-bundle.pem"
            - name: MINIO_ACCESS_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: minio-credentials
                  key: MINIO_ROOT_USER
            - name: MINIO_SECRET_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: minio-credentials
                  key: MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD
          volumeMounts:
            - name: ca-bundle
              mountPath: /etc/ssl/trust
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: ca-bundle
          configMap:
            name: fraud-platform-ca-bundle
            items:
              - key: ca-bundle.pem
                path: ca-bundle.pem

code_after:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: authservice
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: authservice
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: authservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: authservice
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: authservice
        image: dnjau/botswana_emr_auth_image:v3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8081
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "100m"
            memory: "256Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "500m"
            memory: "512Mi"
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /actuator/health/readiness
            port: 8081
          initialDelaySeconds: 20
          periodSeconds: 10
          failureThreshold: 3
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /actuator/health/liveness
            port: 8081
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 15
          failureThreshold: 3
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          runAsNonRoot: true
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          capabilities:
            drop:
              - ALL

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: authservice
  namespace: default
spec:
  # ClusterIP + Ingress is preferred over NodePort — avoids exposing ports on every node
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: authservice
  ports:
  - port: 8081
    targetPort: 8081

FROM node:18-alpine

WORKDIR /app

COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --only=production

COPY . .

RUN npm run build

FROM nginx:alpine
COPY --from=0 /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/nginx.conf

EXPOSE 80

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
code_after:
FROM node:18-alpine

WORKDIR /app

COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --only=production

COPY . .

RUN npm run build

FROM nginx:alpine
COPY --from=0 /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/nginx.conf

EXPOSE 80

# Run as non-root user for security
RUN addgroup -g 1000 -S appgroup && \
    adduser -u 1000 -S appuser -G appgroup

USER appuser:appgroup

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

code_before:
# --------------------------------------
# Kubernetes Deployment for Flask App V2.0
# Purpose: Deploy a Flask application with high availability
# Target: Local Kubernetes (k3d)
# Registry: local-docker-registry:5000
# Production practices: resource limits, probes, security context
# --------------------------------------

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: flask-app-deployment
  labels:
    app: flask-app
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: flask-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: flask-app
    spec:
      # Security: Do not mount service account token unless needed
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      containers:
        - name: flask-app-container
          # Image is replaced at deploy time by the Jenkinsfile with an immutable SHA256 digest
          image: local-docker-registry:5000/sample-flask-app:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5000
          env:
            - name: APP_VERSION
              value: "v2.0 - Production Grade"
          # Resource limits: prevents runaway pods consuming the whole node
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "50m"
              memory: "64Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
          # Readiness probe: K8s only sends traffic when app is actually ready
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 5000
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
          # Liveness probe: K8s restarts the pod if it becomes unhealthy
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 5000
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            failureThreshold: 3
          # Security: run as non-root, read-only filesystem
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            runAsNonRoot: true
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
code_after:
# --------------------------------------
# Kubernetes Deployment for Flask App V2.0
# Purpose: Deploy a Flask application with high availability
# Target: Local Kubernetes (k3d)
# Registry: local-docker-registry:5000
# Production practices: resource limits, probes, security context
# --------------------------------------

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: flask-app-deployment
  labels:
    app: flask-app
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: flask-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: flask-app
    spec:
      # Security: Do not mount service account token unless needed
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      containers:
        - name: flask-app-container
          # Image is replaced at deploy time by the Jenkinsfile with an immutable SHA256 digest
          image: local-docker-registry:5000/sample-flask-app:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5000
          env:
            - name: APP_VERSION
              value: "v2.0 - Production Grade"
          # Resource limits: prevents runaway pods consuming the whole node
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "50m"
              memory: "64Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
          # Readiness probe: K8s only sends traffic when app is actually ready
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 5000
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
          # Liveness probe: K8s restarts the pod if it becomes unhealthy
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 5000
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            failureThreshold: 3
          # Security: run as non-root, read-only filesystem
          # runAsUser/runAsGroup must match UID in Dockerfile (1001)
          # K8s runAsNonRoot validates by UID — numeric value is mandatory
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1001
            runAsGroup: 1001
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          # Gunicorn needs /tmp for worker temp files even with readOnlyRootFilesystem
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-dir
              mountPath: /tmp
      # emptyDir volumes satisfy readOnlyRootFilesystem by providing writable tmpfs
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-dir
          emptyDir: {}

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: rag-agent-frontend
  labels:
    app: rag-agent-frontend
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: rag-agent-frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: rag-agent-frontend
        istio.io/dataplane-mode: none
      annotations:
        ambient.istio.io/redirection: disabled
    spec:
      imagePullSecrets:
      - name: acr-secret
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: rag-agent-chatbot/frontend:latest
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        securityContext:
          capabilities:
            add:
              - NET_RAW
              - NET_ADMIN
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3000
          name: http
        env:
        - name: BACKEND_URL
          value: "http://rag-agent-backend.rag-agent.svc.cluster.local:8000"
        - name: BACKEND_WS_URL
          value: "ws://rag-agent-backend.rag-agent.svc.cluster.local:8000"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "200m"
            memory: "256Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "1000m"
            memory: "1Gi"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 3000
          initialDelaySeconds: 15
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 3000
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: rag-agent-frontend
  labels:
    app: rag-agent-frontend
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: rag-agent-frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: rag-agent-frontend
        istio.io/dataplane-mode: none
      annotations:
        ambient.istio.io/redirection: disabled
    spec:
      imagePullSecrets:
      - name: acr-secret
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: rag-agent-chatbot/frontend:latest
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 101  # nginx user
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          capabilities:
            drop:
              - ALL
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3000
          name: http
        env:
        - name: BACKEND_URL
          value: "http://rag-agent-backend.rag-agent.svc.cluster.local:8000"
        - name: BACKEND_WS_URL
          value: "ws://rag-agent-backend.rag-agent.svc.cluster.local:8000"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp-volume
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: nginx-cache
          mountPath: /var/cache/nginx
        - name: nginx-run
          mountPath: /var/run
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "200m"
            memory: "256Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "1000m"
            memory: "1Gi"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 3000
          initialDelaySeconds: 15
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 3000
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
      volumes:
      - name: tmp-volume
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: nginx-cache
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: nginx-run
        emptyDir: {}

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: sabnzbd
  namespace: media-arr
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: sabnzbd
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: sabnzbd
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: media-arr
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      containers:
        - name: sabnzbd
          image: lscr.io/linuxserver/sabnzbd:4.5.5-ls240
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
              add:
                - CHOWN
                - SETUID
                - SETGID
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 2000m
              memory: 2Gi
          env:
            - name: PUID
              value: "1000"
            - name: PGID
              value: "1000"
            - name: TZ
              value: America/Los_Angeles
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 30
            timeoutSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5

code_before:
# Build stage for Go application
FROM golang:1.25-alpine AS go-builder

# Install build dependencies
RUN apk add --no-cache git make clang llvm

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy go mod files
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Copy source code
COPY . .

# Generate eBPF pre-compiled bytecode
RUN go generate ./pkg/enforcer/...

# Build the application
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -a -installsuffix cgo -o ztap .

# Final stage - minimal runtime image
FROM alpine:3.19

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates

# Create non-root user
RUN addgroup -g 1000 ztap && \
    adduser -D -u 1000 -G ztap ztap

# Create necessary directories
RUN mkdir -p /etc/ztap /var/lib/ztap /var/log/ztap && \
    chown -R ztap:ztap /etc/ztap /var/lib/ztap /var/log/ztap

# Copy compiled binary
COPY --from=go-builder /app/ztap /usr/local/bin/ztap

# Copy example configs
COPY examples/ /etc/ztap/examples/

# Set user
USER ztap

# Expose metrics port
EXPOSE 9090

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /etc/ztap

# Default command
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/ztap"]
CMD ["--help"]
code_after:
# Build stage for Go application
FROM golang:1.25-alpine AS go-builder

# Install build dependencies
RUN apk add --no-cache git make clang llvm

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy go mod files
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Copy source code
COPY . .

# Generate eBPF pre-compiled bytecode
RUN go generate ./pkg/enforcer/...

# Build the application
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -a -installsuffix cgo -o ztap .

# Final stage - minimal runtime image
FROM alpine:3.19

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates iptables

# Create non-root user
RUN addgroup -g 1000 ztap && \
    adduser -D -u 1000 -G ztap ztap

# Create necessary directories
RUN mkdir -p /etc/ztap /var/lib/ztap /var/log/ztap && \
    chown -R ztap:ztap /etc/ztap /var/lib/ztap /var/log/ztap

# Copy compiled binary
COPY --from=go-builder /app/ztap /usr/local/bin/ztap

# Copy example configs
COPY examples/ /etc/ztap/examples/

# Set user
USER ztap

# Expose metrics port
EXPOSE 9090

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /etc/ztap

# Default command
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/ztap"]
CMD ["--help"]

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: ztap-system
---
apiVersion: v1

metadata:
  name: ztap-operator

---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1

metadata:

  namespace: ztap-system
rules:
  - apiGroups:

    resources:
      - leases
    verbs:
      - get
      - list
      - watch
      - create
      - update
      - patch
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: ztap-operator-leader-election
  namespace: ztap-system
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: Role
  name: ztap-operator-leader-election
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: ztap-operator
    namespace: ztap-system
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: ztap-operator
rules:
  - apiGroups:
      - ztap.io
    resources:
      - ztapnetworkpolicies
      - ztapnetworkpolicies/status
      - ztapnetworkpolicies/finalizers
    verbs:
      - get
      - list
      - watch
      - update
      - patch
  - apiGroups:
      - ""
    resources:
      - configmaps
    verbs:
      - get
      - list
      - watch
      - create
      - update
      - patch
      - delete
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: ztap-operator
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: ztap-operator
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: ztap-operator
    namespace: ztap-system
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: ztap-operator
  namespace: ztap-system
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ztap-operator
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ztap-operator
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: ztap-operator
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
      containers:
        - name: manager
          image: ztap-operator:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          args:
            - --metrics-bind-address=:8080
            - --health-probe-bind-address=:8081
            - --leader-elect
          ports:
            - name: metrics
              containerPort: 8080
            - name: healthz
              containerPort: 8081
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 50m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /readyz
              port: 8081
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: ztap-operator
  namespace: ztap-system
spec:
  maxUnavailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ztap-operator

          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
            capabilities:
              drop: ["ALL"]
          env:
            - name: SERVER_HOST
              value: "simple-chat-server"
            - name: SERVER_PORT
              value: "3000"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 100Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 200Mi
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          lifecycle:
            postStart:
              exec:
                command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "mkdir -p /usr/share/nginx/html/config && echo '{\"server\":{\"host\":\"'$SERVER_HOST'\",\"port\":\"'$SERVER_PORT'\"}}' > /usr/share/nginx/html/config/config.json"]
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: debug-container
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: debug-container
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: debug-container
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: debug-container
          image: doridoridoriand/lifeboat-ubuntu:rolling-latest
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
            capabilities:
              drop: ["ALL"]
          command: ["/bin/bash"]
          args: ["-c", "sleep infinity"]
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 100Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 200Mi

code_after:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  labels:
    control-plane: controller-manager
    app.kubernetes.io/name: networkpolicy-agent
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: kustomize
  name: system
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
  name: controller-manager
  namespace: system
  labels:
    control-plane: controller-manager
    app.kubernetes.io/name: networkpolicy-agent
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: kustomize
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      control-plane: controller-manager
      app.kubernetes.io/name: networkpolicy-agent
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        kubectl.kubernetes.io/default-container: manager
      labels:
        control-plane: controller-manager
        app.kubernetes.io/name: networkpolicy-agent
    spec:
      # Windows node selector - only run on Windows nodes
      nodeSelector:
        kubernetes.io/os: windows
      # HostProcess containers require hostNetwork
      hostNetwork: true
      # Service account for RBAC
      serviceAccountName: controller-manager
      # Windows HostProcess security context
      securityContext:
        windowsOptions:
          hostProcess: true
          runAsUserName: "NT AUTHORITY\\SYSTEM"
      containers:
      - name: manager
        image: controller:latest
        command:
          - /networkpolicy-agent.exe
        args:
          - --leader-elect
          - --health-probe-bind-address=:8081
        env:
          # Pass node name via Downward API
          - name: NODE_NAME
            valueFrom:
              fieldRef:
                fieldPath: spec.nodeName
        # Resource limits for Windows containers
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 256Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 128Mi
        # Health probes
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 8081
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 15
          periodSeconds: 20
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /readyz
            port: 8081
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 10
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 10

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: gateway
  namespace: sportstix
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: gateway
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: sportstix
    app.kubernetes.io/component: gateway
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: gateway
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: sportstix
        app.kubernetes.io/component: gateway
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: gateway-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: gateway
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
      containers:
        - name: gateway
          image: sportstix/gateway-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: sportstix-common
            - configMapRef:
                name: gateway-config
          env:
            - name: JAVA_OPTS
              value: "-XX:+UseG1GC -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop: ["ALL"]
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 384Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /actuator/health/readiness
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /actuator/health/liveness
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 45
            periodSeconds: 15
          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /actuator/health
              port: 8080
            failureThreshold: 30
            periodSeconds: 2
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 5"]
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir: {}
---

spec:

code_before:
---
# Source: kubernetes-dashboard/templates/serviceaccount.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  labels:
    app: kubernetes-dashboard
    chart: kubernetes-dashboard-1.10.1
    heritage: Helm
    release: helm
  name: helm-kubernetes-dashboard
  namespace: default
---
# Source: kubernetes-dashboard/templates/secret.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  labels:
    app: kubernetes-dashboard
    chart: kubernetes-dashboard-1.10.1
    heritage: Helm
    release: helm
  name: helm-kubernetes-dashboard
  namespace: default
type: Opaque
---
# Source: kubernetes-dashboard/templates/role.yaml
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  labels:
    app: kubernetes-dashboard
    chart: kubernetes-dashboard-1.10.1
    heritage: Helm
    release: helm
  name: helm-kubernetes-dashboard
  namespace: default
rules:
  # Allow Dashboard to create 'kubernetes-dashboard-key-holder' secret.
- apiGroups:
    - ""
  resources:
    - secrets
  verbs:
    - create

  # Allow Dashboard to create 'kubernetes-dashboard-settings' config map.
- apiGroups:
    - ""
  resources:
    - configmaps
  verbs:
    - create

  # Allow Dashboard to get, update and delete Dashboard exclusive secrets.
- apiGroups:
    - ""
  resources:
    - secrets
  resourceNames:
    - kubernetes-dashboard-key-holder
    - helm-kubernetes-dashboard
  verbs:
    - get
    - update
    - delete

  # Allow Dashboard to get and update 'kubernetes-dashboard-settings' config map.
- apiGroups:
    - ""
  resources:
    - configmaps
  resourceNames:
    - kubernetes-dashboard-settings
  verbs:
    - get
    - update

  # Allow Dashboard to get metrics from heapster.
- apiGroups:
    - ""
  resources:
    - services
  resourceNames:
    - heapster
  verbs:
    - proxy
- apiGroups:
    - ""
  resources:
    - services/proxy
  resourceNames:
    - heapster
    - "http:heapster:"
    - "https:heapster:"
  verbs:
    - get
---
# Source: kubernetes-dashboard/templates/rolebinding.yaml
# Role binding for clusterAdminRole == false and clusterReadOnlyRole=false
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  labels:
    app: kubernetes-dashboard
    chart: kubernetes-dashboard-1.10.1
    heritage: Helm
    release: helm
  name: helm-kubernetes-dashboard
  namespace: default
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: Role
  name: helm-kubernetes-dashboard
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: helm-kubernetes-dashboard
    namespace: default
---
# Source: kubernetes-dashboard/templates/svc.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: helm-kubernetes-dashboard
  labels:
    app: kubernetes-dashboard
    chart: kubernetes-dashboard-1.10.1
    release: helm
    heritage: Helm
    kubernetes.io/cluster-service: "true"
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 443
    targetPort: 8443
    name: "https"
  selector:
    app: kubernetes-dashboard
    release: helm
---
# Source: kubernetes-dashboard/templates/deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: helm-kubernetes-dashboard
  labels:
    app: kubernetes-dashboard
    chart: kubernetes-dashboard-1.10.1
    release: helm
    heritage: Helm
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 0
      maxUnavailable: 1
    type: RollingUpdate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: kubernetes-dashboard
      release: helm
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: kubernetes-dashboard
        release: helm
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: helm-kubernetes-dashboard
      containers:
      - name: kubernetes-dashboard
        image: "k8s.gcr.io/kubernetes-dashboard-amd64:v1.10.1"
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        args:
          - --auto-generate-certificates
        ports:
        - name: https
          containerPort: 8443
          protocol: TCP
        volumeMounts:
        - name: kubernetes-dashboard-certs
          mountPath: /certs
          # Create on-disk volume to store exec logs
        - mountPath: /tmp
          name: tmp-volume
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            scheme: HTTPS
            path: /
            port: 8443
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          timeoutSeconds: 30
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 100Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 100Mi
      volumes:
      - name: kubernetes-dashboard-certs
        secret:
          secretName: helm-kubernetes-dashboard
      - name: tmp-volume
        emptyDir: {}

# Build Stage
FROM node:18-alpine as build
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

# Production Stage
FROM nginx:alpine
COPY --from=build /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
EXPOSE 80
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

        pod: cloudflared
    spec:
      affinity:
        nodeAffinity:
          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            nodeSelectorTerms:
              - matchExpressions:
                  - key: region
                    operator: In
                    values:
                      - us
      securityContext:
        sysctls:
          - name: net.ipv4.ping_group_range
            value: "65532 65532"
      containers:
        - image: cloudflare/cloudflared:2026.2.0
          name: cloudflared
          env:
            - name: TUNNEL_TOKEN
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: cloudflared-token
                  key: token
          command:
            - cloudflared
            - tunnel
            - --no-autoupdate
            - --loglevel
            - info
            - --metrics
            - 0.0.0.0:2000
            - run
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 25m
              memory: 64Mi
            limits:
              memory: 128Mi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              # Cloudflared has a /ready endpoint which returns 200 if and only if
              # it has an active connection to Cloudflare's network.
              path: /ready
              port: 2000
            failureThreshold: 3
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 60
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 2000
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 60
            timeoutSeconds: 5

FROM python:3.12-slim

WORKDIR /app

# Install deps first for layer caching
COPY pyproject.toml .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -e ".[dev]"

code_after:
# ── Builder stage ─────────────────────────────────────────────
FROM python:3.12-slim AS builder

WORKDIR /app

# Install uv for fast dependency resolution
COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:0.5.10 /uv /usr/local/bin/uv

# Copy dependency spec and source (hatchling needs packages=["src"])
COPY pyproject.toml ./
COPY src/ ./src/

# Install production deps only — no editable install in builder
RUN uv venv /opt/venv \
    && uv pip install --python /opt/venv/bin/python --no-cache .

# ── Runtime stage ─────────────────────────────────────────────
FROM python:3.12-slim

# Security: non-root user
RUN groupadd -g 1001 app && useradd -u 1001 -g app -s /bin/false app

WORKDIR /app

# Copy venv from builder (outside /app to avoid volume mount hiding it)
COPY --from=builder /opt/venv /opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:$PATH"

# Copy application source
COPY src/ ./src/

# Own files as app user
RUN chown -R app:app /app
USER app

EXPOSE 8000

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=10s --retries=3 \
    CMD python -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://localhost:8000/api/health/live')" || exit 1

CMD ["uvicorn", "src.main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000", "--workers", "2"]

code_before:
# Multi-stage Dockerfile for Llamenos (Node.js self-hosted mode)
#
# Builds:
#   Stage 1: Frontend SPA (vite build)
#   Stage 2: Node.js server (esbuild)
#   Stage 3: Production image

# Stage 1: Build frontend SPA
FROM oven/bun:1 AS frontend
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile
COPY src/ src/
COPY public/ public/
COPY vite.config.ts tsconfig.json ./
COPY tailwind.config.ts* ./
RUN bun run build

# Stage 2: Build Node.js server
FROM oven/bun:1 AS backend
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile
COPY src/ src/
COPY tsconfig.json esbuild.node.mjs ./
RUN node esbuild.node.mjs

# Stage 3: Production
FROM node:22-slim
WORKDIR /app

# Install better-sqlite3 native module
COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install --production --ignore-scripts && \
    npm install better-sqlite3 --build-from-source

# Copy built artifacts
COPY --from=frontend /app/dist/client/ dist/client/
COPY --from=backend /app/dist/server/ dist/server/

# Create data directory for SQLite databases
RUN mkdir -p /app/data

# Environment defaults
ENV PLATFORM=node \
    PORT=3000 \
    DATA_DIR=/app/data \
    NODE_ENV=production

VOLUME /app/data
EXPOSE 3000

HEALTHCHECK --interval=15s --timeout=5s --start-period=20s --retries=3 \
  CMD curl -f http://localhost:3000/api/health || exit 1

CMD ["node", "dist/server/index.js"]
code_after:
# Multi-stage Dockerfile for Llamenos (Node.js self-hosted mode)
#
# Builds:
#   Stage 1: Frontend SPA (vite build)
#   Stage 2: Node.js server (esbuild)
#   Stage 3: Production image

# Stage 1: Build frontend SPA
FROM oven/bun:1 AS frontend
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile
COPY src/ src/
COPY public/ public/
COPY vite.config.ts tsconfig.json ./
COPY tailwind.config.ts* ./
RUN bun run build

# Stage 2: Build Node.js server
FROM oven/bun:1 AS backend
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json bun.lockb ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile
COPY src/ src/
COPY tsconfig.json esbuild.node.mjs ./
RUN node esbuild.node.mjs

# Stage 3: Production
FROM node:22-slim

# Install curl for healthcheck, then clean up
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create non-root user
RUN groupadd -r llamenos && useradd -r -g llamenos -d /app -s /sbin/nologin llamenos

WORKDIR /app

# Install better-sqlite3 native module
COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install --production --ignore-scripts && \
    npm install better-sqlite3 --build-from-source && \
    npm cache clean --force

# Copy built artifacts
COPY --from=frontend /app/dist/client/ dist/client/
COPY --from=backend /app/dist/server/ dist/server/

# Create data directory with correct ownership
RUN mkdir -p /app/data && chown -R llamenos:llamenos /app

# Switch to non-root user
USER llamenos

# Environment defaults
ENV PLATFORM=node \
    PORT=3000 \
    DATA_DIR=/app/data \
    NODE_ENV=production

VOLUME /app/data
EXPOSE 3000

HEALTHCHECK --interval=15s --timeout=5s --start-period=20s --retries=3 \
  CMD curl -f http://localhost:3000/api/health || exit 1

CMD ["node", "dist/server/index.js"]

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: redis
  namespace: delivery-tracking
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: redis
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 999
      containers:
      - name: redis
        image: redis:7-alpine
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 999
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          capabilities:
            drop: ["ALL"]
          seccompProfile:
            type: RuntimeDefault
        command: ["redis-server"]

        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
        volumeMounts:

          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-prod
  namespace: career-coach-prod
  labels:
    app: backend-prod
    tier: api
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-prod
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-prod
        tier: api
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: backend
        image: node:18-alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        env:
        - name: NODE_ENV
          value: "production"
        - name: PORT
          value: "80"
        - name: DATABASE_HOST
          value: "postgres-service"
        - name: DATABASE_PORT
          value: "5432"
        - name: DATABASE_NAME
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: app-config
              key: POSTGRES_DB
        - name: DATABASE_USER
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: app-secrets
              key: POSTGRES_USER
        - name: DATABASE_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: app-secrets
              key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
        - name: REDIS_HOST
          value: "redis-service"
        - name: REDIS_PORT
          value: "6379"
        - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: app-secrets
              key: REDIS_PASSWORD
        - name: AI_SERVICE_URL
          value: "http://ai-service:80"
        - name: JWT_SECRET
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: app-secrets
              key: JWT_SECRET
        - name: JWT_EXPIRES_IN
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: app-config
              key: JWT_EXPIRES_IN
        - name: CORS_ORIGIN
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: app-config
              key: FRONTEND_URL
        - name: MAX_FILE_SIZE
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: app-config
              key: MAX_FILE_SIZE
        - name: RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: app-config
              key: RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS
        - name: RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: app-config
              key: RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS
        volumeMounts:
        - name: uploads-volume
          mountPath: /app/uploads
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "50m"
          limits:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /api/health
            port: 5000
          initialDelaySeconds: 30

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-prod
  namespace: career-coach-prod
  labels:
    app: backend-prod
    tier: api
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-prod
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-prod
        tier: api
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: backend
        image: career-coach-backend:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 4100
        env:
        - name: NODE_ENV
          value: "production"
        - name: PORT
          value: "4100"
        - name: DATABASE_HOST
          value: "postgres-service"
        - name: DATABASE_PORT
          value: "5432"
        - name: DATABASE_NAME
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: app-config
              key: POSTGRES_DB
        - name: DATABASE_USER
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: app-secrets-prod
              key: POSTGRES_USER
        - name: DATABASE_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: app-secrets-prod
              key: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
        - name: REDIS_HOST
          value: "redis-service"
        - name: REDIS_PORT
          value: "6379"
        - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: app-secrets-prod
              key: REDIS_PASSWORD
        - name: AI_SERVICE_URL
          value: "http://ai-service:5100"
        - name: JWT_SECRET
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: app-secrets-prod
              key: JWT_SECRET
        - name: JWT_EXPIRES_IN
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: app-config
              key: JWT_EXPIRES_IN
        - name: CORS_ORIGIN
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: app-config
              key: FRONTEND_URL
        - name: MAX_FILE_SIZE
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: app-config
              key: MAX_FILE_SIZE
        - name: RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: app-config
              key: RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS
        - name: RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: app-config
              key: RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS
        volumeMounts:
        - name: uploads-volume
          mountPath: /app/uploads
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "50m"
          limits:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /api/health
            port: 4100
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /api/health
            port: 4100
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
      volumes:
      - name: uploads-volume
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          claimName: uploads-pvc

apiVersion: v1

metadata:
  name: backend-service
  namespace: career-coach-prod

    tier: api
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend-prod
  ports:

    targetPort: 4100
    nodePort: 4100

code_before:
# ============================================================
# Multi-stage Dockerfile for GIMI CI/CD Platform
# Targets: server, worker
# ============================================================

# --- Build stage ---
FROM maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-21-alpine AS build
WORKDIR /build
COPY pom.xml .
COPY gimi-core/pom.xml gimi-core/pom.xml
COPY gimi-engine/pom.xml gimi-engine/pom.xml
COPY gimi-server/pom.xml gimi-server/pom.xml
COPY gimi-worker/pom.xml gimi-worker/pom.xml
COPY gimi-cli/pom.xml gimi-cli/pom.xml
RUN mvn dependency:go-offline -pl gimi-server,gimi-worker -am -q 2>/dev/null || true
COPY gimi-core/src gimi-core/src
COPY gimi-engine/src gimi-engine/src
COPY gimi-server/src gimi-server/src
COPY gimi-worker/src gimi-worker/src
COPY gimi-cli/src gimi-cli/src
RUN mvn package -DskipTests -pl gimi-server,gimi-worker -am -q

# --- Server runtime ---
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-alpine AS server
RUN addgroup -S gimi && adduser -S gimi -G gimi
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=build /build/gimi-server/target/*.jar app.jar
COPY pipelines/ pipelines/
USER gimi
EXPOSE 8080
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]

# --- Worker runtime ---
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-alpine AS worker
RUN addgroup -S gimi && adduser -S gimi -G gimi
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=build /build/gimi-worker/target/*.jar app.jar
USER gimi
EXPOSE 8081
ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]
code_after:
# ============================================================
# Multi-stage Dockerfile for GIMI CI/CD Platform
# Targets: server, worker
# ============================================================

# --- Build stage ---
FROM maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-21-alpine AS build
WORKDIR /build
COPY pom.xml .
COPY gimi-core/pom.xml gimi-core/pom.xml
COPY gimi-engine/pom.xml gimi-engine/pom.xml
COPY gimi-server/pom.xml gimi-server/pom.xml
COPY gimi-worker/pom.xml gimi-worker/pom.xml
COPY gimi-cli/pom.xml gimi-cli/pom.xml
RUN mvn dependency:go-offline -pl gimi-server,gimi-worker -am -q 2>/dev/null || true
COPY gimi-core/src gimi-core/src
COPY gimi-engine/src gimi-engine/src
COPY gimi-server/src gimi-server/src
COPY gimi-worker/src gimi-worker/src
COPY gimi-cli/src gimi-cli/src
RUN mvn package -DskipTests -pl gimi-server,gimi-worker -am -q

# --- Server runtime ---
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-alpine AS server
RUN addgroup -S gimi && adduser -S gimi -G gimi
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=build /build/gimi-server/target/*.jar app.jar
COPY pipelines/ pipelines/
USER gimi
EXPOSE 8080
ENV JAVA_OPTS="-XX:+UseG1GC -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0 -XX:+UseContainerSupport -Djava.security.egd=file:/dev/./urandom"
ENTRYPOINT ["sh", "-c", "java $JAVA_OPTS -jar app.jar"]

# --- Worker runtime ---
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-alpine AS worker
RUN addgroup -S gimi && adduser -S gimi -G gimi
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=build /build/gimi-worker/target/*.jar app.jar
USER gimi
EXPOSE 8081
ENV JAVA_OPTS="-XX:+UseG1GC -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0 -XX:+UseContainerSupport -Djava.security.egd=file:/dev/./urandom"
ENTRYPOINT ["sh", "-c", "java $JAVA_OPTS -jar app.jar"]

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nats
  namespace: cryptofunk
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: nats
    app.kubernetes.io/component: messaging
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: nats
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: nats
        app.kubernetes.io/component: messaging
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nats
        image: nats:2.10-alpine
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
        ports:
        - containerPort: 4222
          name: client
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 8222
          name: monitoring
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 6222
          name: cluster
          protocol: TCP
        command: ["nats-server", "-js", "-m", "8222"]
        volumeMounts:
        - name: nats-data
          mountPath: /data/jetstream
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "100m"
            memory: "256Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "500m"
            memory: "512Mi"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 8222
          initialDelaySeconds: 15
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 8222
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 1
          failureThreshold: 3
      - name: nats-exporter
        image: natsio/prometheus-nats-exporter:0.15.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        # prometheus-nats-exporter: -varz enables /varz metrics, -port sets listen port.
        # -connz/-subsz were removed because they caused the exporter to exit with
        # "flag provided but not defined" on this image version (0.15.0).
        args:
          - "-varz"
          - "-port=7777"
          - "http://localhost:8222"
        ports:
        - name: metrics
          containerPort: 7777
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "50m"
            memory: "32Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "100m"
            memory: "64Mi"
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 7777
          initialDelaySeconds: 3
          periodSeconds: 10
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 7777
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - name: nats-data
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          claimName: nats-data-pvc

code_before:
# external-dns for automatic DNS record management
# Watches Ingress resources and auto-creates DNS entries for fraud.internal
#
# Phase 1 (minikube): use 07-etc-hosts.sh for manual /etc/hosts entries
# Phase 2 (bare metal): deploy this manifest with a supported DNS provider
#
# Supported providers for internal DNS:
#   - coredns: requires etcd backend in CoreDNS
#   - rfc2136: updates BIND via dynamic DNS (TSIG auth)
#
# Install via Helm (alternative):
#   helm repo add external-dns https://kubernetes-sigs.github.io/external-dns/
#   helm install external-dns external-dns/external-dns \
#     --namespace kube-system \
#     --set provider=coredns \
#     --set coredns.etcdEndpoints="http://etcd-cluster.kube-system.svc.cluster.local:2379" \
#     --set txtOwnerId=fraud-platform \
#     --set domainFilters[0]=fraud.internal \
#     --set policy=sync
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: external-dns
  namespace: kube-system
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: external-dns
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["services", "endpoints", "pods"]
  verbs: ["get", "watch", "list"]
- apiGroups: ["extensions", "networking.k8s.io"]
  resources: ["ingresses"]
  verbs: ["get", "watch", "list"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["nodes"]
  verbs: ["list", "watch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: external-dns-viewer
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: external-dns
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: external-dns
  namespace: kube-system
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: external-dns
  namespace: kube-system
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: external-dns
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: external-dns
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: external-dns
      containers:
      - name: external-dns
        image: registry.fraud.internal/fraud-platform/external-dns:v0.20.0
        args:
        - --source=ingress
        - --domain-filter=fraud.internal
        - --provider=coredns  # Change to rfc2136 for BIND
        - --coredns-prefix=/skydns/
        - --txt-owner-id=fraud-platform
        - --policy=sync
        - --log-level=info
        env:
        - name: ETCD_URLS
          value: "http://etcd-cluster.kube-system.svc.cluster.local:2379"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "50m"
          limits:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "200m"

      - name: external-dns
        image: registry.fraud.internal/fraud-platform/external-dns:v0.20.0
        args:
        - --source=ingress
        - --domain-filter=fraud.internal
        - --provider=coredns  # Change to rfc2136 for BIND
        - --coredns-prefix=/skydns/
        - --txt-owner-id=fraud-platform
        - --policy=sync
        - --log-level=info
        env:
        - name: ETCD_URLS
          value: "http://etcd-cluster.kube-system.svc.cluster.local:2379"
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          capabilities:
            drop: [ALL]
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "50m"
          limits:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "200m"

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: abov3-exodus
  labels:
    app: abov3-exodus
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: abov3-exodus
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: abov3-exodus
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: exodus
          image: ghcr.io/abov3ai/exodus:beta
          ports:
            - containerPort: 3000
          env:
            - name: NODE_ENV
              value: "production"
            # SECURITY: Disable local model endpoints in cloud deployment
            # This prevents SSRF attacks by blocking localhost/private IP requests
            - name: NEXT_PUBLIC_DEPLOYMENT_MODE
              value: "cloud"
            - name: NEXTAUTH_URL
              value: "https://exodus.abov3.ai"
            - name: NEXTAUTH_SECRET
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: auth-secrets
                  key: nextauth-secret
            - name: POSTGRES_PRISMA_URL
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: url
            - name: POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: direct-url
            # High Availability: Read Replica URL (optional)
            # Routes read operations to replica for better performance
            - name: POSTGRES_READ_URL
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: read-url
                  optional: true  # Falls back to primary if not set
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "2Gi"
              cpu: "1000m"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /api/health
              port: 3000
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /api/health
              port: 3000
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: abov3-exodus
spec:
  selector:
    app: abov3-exodus
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 3000
  type: ClusterIP

code_after:
# ── ConfigMap ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: event-generator-config
  namespace: payments
data:
  # ── Server ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  PORT:      "8081"
  GRPC_ADDR: ":9081"

  # ── Legacy TPS poster (backward-compat; scheduler is the primary mode) ──
  TARGET_URL:           "http://m2p-middleware:8082"
  FIRE_RATE_TPS:        "50"
  BURST_ENABLED:        "false"
  BURST_TPS:            "500"
  BURST_DURATION_MS:    "5000"
  BURST_INTERVAL_MS:    "30000"
  ERROR_INJECTION_RATE: "0.05"
  LATENCY_SIM_MS:       "0"
  CP_RATIO:             "0.5"
  ENABLE_DUPLICATES:    "false"

  # ── Simulated clock & behavioral scheduler ──────────────────────────────
  # Set to "true" to auto-start the sim clock when the pod initialises.
  # When false, the dashboard POST /sim/start triggers it explicitly.
  SIM_AUTO_START: "false"

  # Acceleration factor: 60 = 1 sim-minute per real-second (good default).
  # 1 = real-time, 3600 = 1 sim-hour/s, 86400 = 1 sim-day/s.
  SIM_DEFAULT_ACCELERATION: "60"

  # RNG seed (0 = derive from entropy — different each run).
  # Set a fixed value for reproducible simulation replays.
  SIM_DEFAULT_SEED: "0"

  # Simulated wall-clock epoch. Monday 2025-01-06 starts on a weekday
  # so the first events fire in a realistic "WORKING" state.
  SIM_START_TS: "2025-01-06T00:00:00Z"

  # Set to "true" to wipe all persisted session/event rows on startup.
  FRESH_START: "false"
---

# ── Deployment ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: event-generator
  namespace: payments
  labels:
    app: event-generator
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: event-generator
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: event-generator
      annotations:
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port:   "8081"
        prometheus.io/path:   "/metrics"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: event-generator
          image: fin-os/event-generator:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9081
              name: grpc
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: event-generator-config
          env:
            # DATABASE_URL is stored in timescaledb-secret so credentials
            # don't live in the ConfigMap. If the secret is absent (e.g. dev
            # without a DB) the service runs in stateless no-op mode.
            - name: DATABASE_URL
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: timescaledb-secret
                  key: DATABASE_URL
                  optional: true
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              # The behavioral scheduler runs O(employees) goroutines and
              # wakes on simulated-time events. 1 CPU handles ~100 concurrent
              # employees at 60× acceleration without throttling.
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 3
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 5"]
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
---

# ── Service ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: event-generator
  namespace: payments
  labels:
    app: event-generator
spec:
  selector:
    app: event-generator
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
    - name: grpc
      port: 9081
      targetPort: 9081

              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20

            name: prometheus-config
        - name: data

            claimName: prometheus-data

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: prometheus
  labels:
    app: prometheus
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: prometheus
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: prometheus
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: prometheus
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 65534
        runAsGroup: 65534
        fsGroup: 65534
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: prometheus
          image: prom/prometheus:v2.48.0
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          args:
            - '--config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml'
            - '--storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus'
            - '--storage.tsdb.retention.time=15d'
            - '--web.enable-lifecycle'
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 9090
          volumeMounts:
            - name: config
              mountPath: /etc/prometheus
            - name: data
              mountPath: /prometheus
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /-/ready
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /-/healthy
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
      volumes:
        - name: config
          configMap:
            name: prometheus-config
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: prometheus-data
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: prometheus
---
# Scoped Role for Prometheus - only allows scraping pods in specific namespaces
# with the prometheus.io/scrape annotation
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: prometheus
  namespace: default
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["services", "endpoints", "pods"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: prometheus
  namespace: default
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: Role
  name: prometheus
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: prometheus
    namespace: monitoring
---
# Monitoring namespace role
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: prometheus
  namespace: monitoring
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["services", "endpoints", "pods"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["configmaps"]
    verbs: ["get"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: prometheus
  namespace: monitoring
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: Role
  name: prometheus
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: prometheus
    namespace: monitoring
---
# Limited ClusterRole for metrics endpoint access only
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: prometheus-metrics
rules:
  - nonResourceURLs: ["/metrics"]
    verbs: ["get"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: prometheus-metrics
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: prometheus-metrics
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: prometheus
    namespace: monitoring

          name: repo
        - mountPath: /wrapper
          name: http-wrapper
        workingDir: /repo
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      initContainers:
      - command:
        - sh
        - -c
        - 'mkdir -p /repo/mcp_sandfly

          cp /source-server/server.py /repo/mcp_sandfly/

          cp /source-init/__init__.py /repo/mcp_sandfly/

          echo "Source files copied"

          ls -laR /repo

          '
        image: busybox
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        name: setup-source
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /repo
          name: repo
        - mountPath: /source-server
          name: source-server
        - mountPath: /source-init
          name: source-init
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - emptyDir: {}
        name: repo
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 420
          name: mcp-http-wrapper
        name: http-wrapper
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 420
          name: sandfly-mcp-server-py
        name: source-server
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 420
          name: sandfly-mcp-init-py
        name: source-init

  ports:
  - port: 8080

    protocol: TCP
    name: http

    targetPort: 9090
    protocol: TCP
    name: grpc
  selector:
    app: aixgo
    component: orchestrator

apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: aixgo-hpa
  namespace: aixgo
spec:

    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment

  maxReplicas: 10

  - type: Resource

      name: memory
      target:

        averageUtilization: 80

code_before:
# BC Skills MCP Server Docker Image
# Supports both stdio (local) and HTTP (production) modes
FROM node:20-slim

# Install build dependencies for native modules (better-sqlite3)
# and curl for health checks
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3 \
    make \
    g++ \
    curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create app directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package files first for better caching
COPY package*.json ./

# Install dependencies
RUN npm ci --only=production

# Copy compiled JavaScript (dist folder)
COPY dist/ ./dist/

# Create superpowers directory (will be mounted as volume)
RUN mkdir -p /superpowers

# Environment variables with defaults
ENV NODE_ENV=production
ENV BC_SKILLS_PATH=/superpowers
ENV BC_SKILLS_SERVER_NAME=bc-skills-server
ENV BC_SKILLS_SERVER_VERSION=1.0.0
ENV BC_SKILLSHIELD_ENABLED=true
ENV BC_SKILLSHIELD_LEVEL=high

# HTTP mode settings (set BC_HTTP_MODE=true to enable)
ENV BC_HTTP_MODE=false
ENV BC_HTTP_PORT=3000

# Expose HTTP port (only used in HTTP mode)
EXPOSE 3000

# Health check for HTTP mode
# In stdio mode, health check is disabled
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=40s --retries=3 \
    CMD if [ "$BC_HTTP_MODE" = "true" ]; then curl -f http://localhost:3000/health || exit 1; else exit 0; fi

# Entry script to choose between stdio and HTTP mode
CMD if [ "$BC_HTTP_MODE" = "true" ]; then \
        node dist/http-server.js; \
    else \
        node dist/index.js; \
    fi
code_after:
# BC Skills MCP Server Docker Image
# Multi-stage build for production with non-root user

# ============================================
# Build Stage
# ============================================
FROM node:20 AS builder

# Install build dependencies for native modules
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3 \
    make \
    g++ \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /build

# Copy package files first for better caching
COPY package*.json ./

# Install all dependencies (including devDependencies for build)
RUN npm ci

# Copy source files
COPY tsconfig.json ./
COPY src/ ./src/

# Copy superpowers (skills/agents) content
COPY superpowers/ ./superpowers/

# Copy Prisma schema
COPY prisma/ ./prisma/

# Build TypeScript
RUN npm run build

# Generate Prisma client if schema exists
RUN if [ -f "prisma/schema.prisma" ]; then npx prisma generate; fi

# ============================================
# Production Stage
# ============================================
FROM node:20-slim

# Install curl for health checks
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /build/dist ./dist/
COPY --from=builder /build/node_modules ./node_modules/
COPY --from=builder /build/package*.json ./

# Copy Prisma files
COPY --from=builder /build/prisma ./prisma/

# Copy superpowers from builder (bundled in image)
COPY --from=builder /build/superpowers ./superpowers/

# Set ownership for the existing node user (UID 1000)
RUN chown -R node:node /app

# Switch to non-root user (node user exists in node:20-slim)
USER node

# Environment variables with defaults
ENV NODE_ENV=production
ENV BC_SKILLS_PATH=/app/superpowers
ENV BC_SKILLS_SERVER_NAME=bc-skills-server
ENV BC_SKILLS_SERVER_VERSION=1.0.0
ENV BC_SKILLSHIELD_ENABLED=true
ENV BC_SKILLSHIELD_LEVEL=high

# HTTP mode settings (set BC_HTTP_MODE=true to enable)
ENV BC_HTTP_MODE=true
ENV BC_HTTP_PORT=3000

# Expose HTTP port
EXPOSE 3000

# Health check for HTTP mode
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=40s --retries=3 \
    CMD curl -f http://localhost:3000/health || exit 1

# Entry point - HTTP mode for K8s
CMD ["node", "dist/http-server.js"]

code_before:
# Build stage
FROM golang:1.25-alpine AS builder
ARG VERSION=dev
WORKDIR /app
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download
COPY . .
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -ldflags="-w -s -X github.com/ignacio/lumo/internal/version.Version=${VERSION}" -o lumo ./cmd/lumo

# Final stage
FROM alpine:latest
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/lumo .
RUN apk --no-cache add ca-certificates
EXPOSE 8080
ENTRYPOINT ["./lumo"]
code_after:
# Build stage
FROM golang:1.25-alpine3.21 AS builder

ARG VERSION=dev

WORKDIR /app

# Cache dependencies
COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

# Build with optimizations
COPY . .
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build \
    -ldflags="-w -s -X github.com/ignacio/lumo/internal/version.Version=${VERSION}" \
    -trimpath \
    -o lumo ./cmd/lumo

# Compress binary with UPX (reduces size ~50-70%)
RUN apk add --no-cache upx && upx --best --lzma lumo

# Final stage - scratch for minimal size (~5-10MB total)
FROM scratch

# Copy CA certificates for HTTPS
COPY --from=builder /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt /etc/ssl/certs/

# Copy binary
COPY --from=builder /app/lumo /lumo

EXPOSE 8080

ENTRYPOINT ["/lumo"]

kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: keycloak

  template:
    spec:
      # Remove init container - Cloud SQL Proxy sidecar starts simultaneously
      # and has its own readiness probe
      initContainers: []

      # Main container array - merge with base
      containers:
      - name: keycloak
        # Add management port for health endpoints
        ports:
        - name: management
          containerPort: 9000
          protocol: TCP

        env:
        # Update database connection to use Cloud SQL via localhost
        - name: KC_DB_URL
          value: "jdbc:postgresql://127.0.0.1:5432/keycloak"
        - name: KC_DB_USERNAME
          valueFrom:
